name: contact
description: Configuration keywords for 'plot item create contact'. Controls contact rendering, force scaling, coloring by properties or attributes, cut planes, and legend display.

basic_keywords.description: Show item in plot (default when created)
Scale contact line thickness by force magnitude
basic_keywords.notes: When on, thicker lines indicate larger forces

basic_keywords.description: Show color legend for this item
Configure color scale for numeric/vector attributes
basic_keywords.syntax: color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Color contacts by force, model properties, or text attributes

sub_items.name: cut
sub_items.description: Clip visualization with a cutting plane

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create contact active on color-by vector-attribute "force" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic scale-by-force on legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Force chains with thickness and color encoding magnitude

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create contact active on color-by numeric-property "fric" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic legend active on
